About Flannery's

A home built on warmth, family & trust

Nestled in the peaceful village of Abbeyknockmoy, Tuam, Flannery's is a family-run care home founded by Kathleen and the late Vincent Flannery, where every resident is treated as one of our own.

Our care plans are built around the individual — their routines, preferences, and personality. Our team share a single purpose: to support residents to live well, with dignity and independence, every day.

Our care

Personalised care for every stage of life

Long-term, respite, and dementia care — all delivered with compassion and expertise.
